Metrics Collectors (`internal/metrics/`)\n64\t- **SystemCollector**: Collects CPU, memory, swap, disk I/O, and load averages using gopsutil\n65\t- **TokenCollector**: Parses Claude Code JSONL files to track token usage and costs\n66\t- **TmuxCollector**: Monitors tmux sessions and their status\n67\t\n68\t#### 2. Dashboard UI (`internal/ui/dashboard.go`)\n69\t- **Bubble Tea Model**: Implements the Model-View-Update pattern\n70\t- **Three Panel Layout**: System Resources, Token Usage, and Tmux Sessions\n71\t- **Responsive Design**: Adapts to terminal size with three layout modes\n72\t- **Auto-refresh**: Updates every 2 seconds automatically\n73\t\n74\t#### 3. Main Entry Point (`cmd/ccdash/main.go`)\n75\t- Command-line flag parsing (--version, --help)\n76\t- Terminal size validation\n77\t- Dashboard initialization and execution\n78\t\n79\t## Features\n80\t\n81\t### Layout Modes\n82\t1. **Ultra-wide (≥240 cols)**: 3 panels side-by-side\n83\t2. **Wide (120-239 cols, ≥30 lines)**: 2 panels top, 1 bottom\n84\t3. **Narrow (<120 cols)**: Panels stacked vertically\n85\t\n86\t### Keyboard Shortcuts\n87\t- `q` or `Ctrl+C` - Quit the dashboard\n88\t- `r` - Refresh metrics immediately\n89\t- `1` - Focus System Resources panel\n90\t- `2` - Focus Token Usage panel\n91\t- `3` - Focus TMUX Sessions panel\n92\t\n93\t### Panel Details\n94\t\n95\t#### System Resources Panel\n96\t- Load averages (1, 5, 15 minutes)\n97\t- CPU usage (total + per-core with htop-style bars)\n98\t- Memory usage with bar graph\n99\t- Swap usage with bar graph\n100\t- Disk I/O rates (read/write)\n101\t\n102\t#### Token Usage Panel\n103\t- Input/Output token counts\n104\t- Cache creation/read tokens\n105\t- Total tokens with formatting\n106\t- Estimated costs (Claude Sonnet 4.5 pricing)\n107\t- Current rate (tokens/min)\n108\t- Session average rate\n109\t- Time span\n110\t- Models used\n111\t\n112\t#### TMUX Sessions Panel\n113\t- Grid layout of sessions\n114\t- Status indicators with emojis:\n115\t  - 🟢 WORKING - Actively processing\n116\t  - 🔴 READY - Waiting at prompt\n117\t  - 🟡 ACTIVE - Recent activity\n118\t  - 💤 IDLE - No activity >5 minutes\n119\t  - ⚠️ STALLED - Errors detected\n120\t- Window count\n121\t- Attached status\n122\t- Session age\n123\t\n124\t### Styling\n125\t- Colored panels with rounded borders (lipgloss)\n126\t- htop-style progress bars with percentage inside\n127\t- Color-coded thresholds (green/yellow/orange/red)\n128\t- Focused panel highlighting (green border)\n129\t- Status bar with keyboard shortcuts\n130\t\n131\t## Dependencies\n132\t\n133\t### Main Dependencies\n134\t- `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea` v1.3.10 - TUI framework\n135\t- `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` v1.1.0 - Styling library\n136\t- `github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3` v3.24.5 - System metrics\n137\t- `golang.org/x/term` v0.37.0 - Terminal operations\n138\t\n139\t### Transitive Dependencies\n140\tSee `go.mod` for complete list.\n141\t\n142\t## Implementation Notes\n143\t\n144\t### Metrics Collection\n145\t- System metrics collected via gopsutil library\n146\t- Token metrics parsed from `~/.claude/projects/*/sessions/*.jsonl`\n147\t- Tmux metrics gathered via `tmux list-sessions` command\n148\t- All collectors designed to handle errors gracefully\n149\t\n150\t### Performance\n151\t- Auto-refresh every 2 seconds\n152\t- Non-blocking metrics collection using Bubble Tea commands\n153\t- Efficient rendering with lipgloss layout system\n154\t- No external API calls (all data local)\n155\t\n156\t### Error Handling\n157\t- Graceful degradation when metrics unavailable\n158\t- Error messages displayed in respective panels\n159\t- Continued operation even if one collector fails\n160\t\n161\t## Future Enhancements (Not Implemented)\n162\t- Configurable refresh interval\n163\t- Panel selection persistence\n164\t- Export metrics to CSV/JSON\n165\t- Historical graphs\n166\t- Alert thresholds configuration\n167\t- Multiple Claude Code project support\n168\t- SSH remote monitoring\n169\t\n170\t## Troubleshooting\n171\t\n172\t### Build Errors\n173\t```bash\n174\t# Clean and rebuild\n175\tgo clean\n176\tgo mod tidy\n177\tgo build -o ccdash ./cmd/ccdash\n178\t```\n179\t\n180\t### Terminal Size Warning\n181\tMinimum recommended: 80x24 characters. Build Instructions\n\n## Overview\nccdash is a terminal UI dashboard for monitoring system resources, Claude Code token usage, and tmux sessions.\n\n## Requirements\n- Go 1.22.2 or later\n- Terminal with true color support (recommended)\n- tmux (optional, for session monitoring)\n- Claude Code with `~/.claude/projects` directory (for token usage tracking)\n\n## Building\n\n### From Source\n```bash\ncd /workspaces/test-agor/ccdash\ngo build -o ccdash ./cmd/ccdash\n```\n\n### Install Dependencies\n```bash\ngo mod download\n```\n\n### Run Tests\n```bash\ngo test ./...\n```\n\n## Running\n\n### Start the Dashboard\n```bash\n./ccdash\n```\n\n### Command-line Options\n- `--version` - Show version information\n- `--help` - Show help message\n\n## Architecture\n\n### Directory Structure\n```\nccdash/\n├── cmd/\n│   └── ccdash/\n│       └── main.go           # Entry point with CLI flags\n├── internal/\n│   ├── metrics/              # Metrics collectors\n│   │   ├── system.go         # System resource metrics\n│   │   ├── tokens.go         # Token usage metrics\n│   │   ├── tmux.go           # Tmux session metrics\n│   │   └── claude.go         # Claude Code usage parser\n│   └── ui/\n│       └── dashboard.go      # Bubble Tea TUI implementation\n├── go.mod\n└── BUILD.md\n```\n\n### Key Components\n\n#### 1. Metrics Collectors (`internal/metrics/`)\n- **SystemCollector**: Collects CPU, memory, swap, disk I/O, and load averages using gopsutil\n- **TokenCollector**: Parses Claude Code JSONL files to track token usage and costs\n- **TmuxCollector**: Monitors tmux sessions and their status\n\n#### 2. Dashboard UI (`internal/ui/dashboard.go`)\n- **Bubble Tea Model**: Implements the Model-View-Update pattern\n- **Three Panel Layout**: System Resources, Token Usage, and Tmux Sessions\n- **Responsive Design**: Adapts to terminal size with three layout modes\n- **Auto-refresh**: Updates every 2 seconds automatically\n\n#### 3. Main Entry Point (`cmd/ccdash/main.go`)\n- Command-line flag parsing (--version, --help)\n- Terminal size validation\n- Dashboard initialization and execution\n\n## Features\n\n### Layout Modes\n1. **Ultra-wide (≥240 cols)**: 3 panels side-by-side\n2. **Wide (120-239 cols, ≥30 lines)**: 2 panels top, 1 bottom\n3. **Narrow (<120 cols)**: Panels stacked vertically\n\n### Keyboard Shortcuts\n- `q` or `Ctrl+C` - Quit the dashboard\n- `r` - Refresh metrics immediately\n- `1` - Focus System Resources panel\n- `2` - Focus Token Usage panel\n- `3` - Focus TMUX Sessions panel\n\n### Panel Details\n\n#### System Resources Panel\n- Load averages (1, 5, 15 minutes)\n- CPU usage (total + per-core with htop-style bars)\n- Memory usage with bar graph\n- Swap usage with bar graph\n- Disk I/O rates (read/write)\n\n#### Token Usage Panel\n- Input/Output token counts\n- Cache creation/read tokens\n- Total tokens with formatting\n- Estimated costs (Claude Sonnet 4.5 pricing)\n- Current rate (tokens/min)\n- Session average rate\n- Time span\n- Models used\n\n#### TMUX Sessions Panel\n- Grid layout of sessions\n- Status indicators with emojis:\n  - 🟢 WORKING - Actively processing\n  - 🔴 READY - Waiting at prompt\n  - 🟡 ACTIVE - Recent activity\n  - 💤 IDLE - No activity >5 minutes\n  - ⚠️ STALLED - Errors detected\n- Window count\n- Attached status\n- Session age\n\n### Styling\n- Colored panels with rounded borders (lipgloss)\n- htop-style progress bars with percentage inside\n- Color-coded thresholds (green/yellow/orange/red)\n- Focused panel highlighting (green border)\n- Status bar with keyboard shortcuts\n\n## Dependencies\n\n### Main Dependencies\n- `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea` v1.3.10 - TUI framework\n- `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` v1.1.0 - Styling library\n- `github.com/shirou/gopsutil/v3` v3.24.5 - System metrics\n- `golang.org/x/term` v0.37.0 - Terminal operations\n\n### Transitive Dependencies\nSee `go.mod` for complete list.\n\n## Implementation Notes\n\n### Metrics Collection\n- System metrics collected via gopsutil library\n- Token metrics parsed from `~/.claude/projects/*/sessions/*.jsonl`\n- Tmux metrics gathered via `tmux list-sessions` command\n- All collectors designed to handle errors gracefully\n\n### Performance\n- Auto-refresh every 2 seconds\n- Non-blocking metrics collection using Bubble Tea commands\n- Efficient rendering with lipgloss layout system\n- No external API calls (all data local)\n\n### Error Handling\n- Graceful degradation when metrics unavailable\n- Error messages displayed in respective panels\n- Continued operation even if one collector fails\n\n## Future Enhancements (Not Implemented)\n- Configurable refresh interval\n- Panel selection persistence\n- Export metrics to CSV/JSON\n- Historical graphs\n- Alert thresholds configuration\n- Multiple Claude Code project support\n- SSH remote monitoring\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Build Errors\n```bash\n# Clean and rebuild\ngo clean\ngo mod tidy\ngo build -o ccdash ./cmd/ccdash\n```\n\n### Terminal Size Warning\nMinimum recommended: 80x24 characters. Resize terminal or continue anyway.\n\n### Token Usage Not Showing\n- Ensure `~/.claude/projects` directory exists\n- Check that current directory is a Claude Code project\n- Verify JSONL files exist in project sessions directory\n\n### Tmux Sessions Not Showing\n- Install tmux: `sudo apt-get install tmux`\n- Ensure tmux server is running: `tmux ls`\n\n## License\nSee project root for license information.\n","numLines":194,"startLine":1,"totalLines":194}}}
